mapper.sql: id, dispute_no, order_id, initiator_id, respondent_id, admin_id, dispute_type, reason, detail, evidence_json, freeze_amount, status, result_type, resolution_note, resolved_at, closed_at, version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from `dispute` order by id desc
mapper.update: update `dispute` set admin_id = #{adminId}, status = 3, result_type = #{resultType}, resolution_note = #{resolutionNote}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, closed_at = #{closedAt}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and status in (0, 1, 2)
